parameters: ...Oh right, Shino invited me to dinner over RIME, didn't she?
I gotta reply to her first.
...Oh right, Shino invited me to dinner over RIME, didn't she?
I gotta reply to her first.
...Oh right, Shino invited me to dinner over RIME, didn't she?
I gotta reply to her first.
...Oh right, Shino invited me to dinner over RIME, didn't she?
I gotta reply to her first.
\SE[9]Wah, \n[1]. You really are awake. What a good boy you are, waking up so early~
\se[3]\SM[jump]\SA[130]A-Ahahah--, did I say that? I don't remember saying that...
\SE[4]F-Forget that, do you have any plans for today?
When I told her that I didn't, she giggled out loud.
\SE[26]The usual for you, I see~. Be careful of cars, okay~?
...Just where is she even going this early?
\se[30-nb]\SA[130]I-I, uhm... I guess I don't have any plans either?
\se[44]\sa[132]\SM[jump]Woah, I forgot something back inside, so just head out without me, sorry--!
Just as she was trying to hurry back inside... she turned around and looked at me.
\se[55-nb]Hey... \n[1]. Mind if I ask something weird?
\se[19]Do you still... resent uncle for it?
At the words that I never expected to come out of her mouth,
I felt a lump in my throat.
She'd always intentionally avoided talking about our relationship before.
Just what changed? As for her question...
He's always kept saying it, so.
He's always kept saying it, so.
In a bad mood, I ended up blurting out words that I didn't really mean.
...I knew that it was just plain old pigheadedness, nothing more.
I'd already stopped hating him long ago.
She turned her face away, and bit her own lips tightly.
Maybe the stormy air between us father and son has been causing
\se[55]\SA[130]Sorry for asking something weird like that... I really, am sorry.
\se[38-nb]\SA[130]...I'm going to grab my stuff, okay? See you.
I reflected upon my actions as I watched her return back inside.
It's not just a problem between us two, so I gotta take care of it soon.
I headed outside without any destination in mind,
to sort out my own thoughts.

---Time to try my best and become someone who can apologize properly, before summer 
starts.
Would you like to view [Shino's viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)
